rules.statement: Logic modules MUST NOT call 'asyncio.run()' or manually create new event loops.

SUPERSEDED by architecture.boundary.database_session_access (issue #512). That constitutional rule carries full layer-permission semantics (Mind/Will MUST use DI; Body/infra/shared MAY import directly) and renders this terse policy rule redundant. Append-only closure marker: rule retained as historical record; enforcement downgraded to advisory; mapping entry removed so no findings are dispatched.
rules.rationale: The original statement 'MUST NOT import get_session globally' was ambiguous between Reading A (no module-global session instance) and Reading B (no module-scope import statement). architecture.boundary.database_session_access resolves both readings with explicit layer permissions. Scope of the retired mapping (src/features/**  — directory removed — and src/body/services/**) was fully subsumed. Retired per direction 2, issue #512.

rules.statement: Operational logs MUST use standard 'getLogger' and avoid f-strings for lazy evaluation.
